title: 16-year-old arrested for using gun to rob 14-year-old girl of fatbike
title_zh: 一名16岁少年因持枪抢劫一名14岁女孩的胖胎自行车而被捕。
description: A 14-year-old girl was threatened with a firearm during a robbery on Laan van Welhorst on Wednesday evening, authorities said. The assailants fled on the girl’s fatbike around 6:50 p.m.
description_zh: 据警方称，周三晚间，一名14岁女孩在韦尔霍斯特街遭遇抢劫，歹徒持枪威胁她。下午6点50分左右，歹徒骑着女孩的胖胎自行车逃离现场。

title: VVD considers mandatory payments from party leaders amid falling revenue
title_zh: 在收入下降的情况下，自由民主党考虑向党内领导人强制缴纳会费。
description: The VVD is exploring a mandatory contribution from its political leaders as a way to address declining party revenues, party officials confirmed Saturday at a general members’ meeting in Bussum.
description_zh: 周六，在布苏姆举行的全体党员大会上，自由民主人民党（VVD）官员证实，该党正在探索强制其政治领导人缴纳会费，以应对党内收入下降的问题。

title: Three injured after car crashes into home, ignites; Driver suspected of drunken driving
title_zh: 汽车撞入民宅起火，三人受伤；司机涉嫌酒后驾车
description: Three people were injured early Saturday morning when a car crashed into a home in Zuidveen, police confirmed. The vehicle caught fire after colliding with the house on Burgemeester G. W.
description_zh: 警方证实，周六清晨，一辆汽车在祖伊德芬撞入一户民宅，造成三人受伤。该车辆在撞上位于伯吉梅斯特GW路的房屋后起火。

title: Police name and release a photo of ninth suspect in the murder of Sherwin Peterhof
title_zh: 警方公布了谢尔温·彼得霍夫谋杀案第九名嫌疑人的姓名和照片。
description: Dutch police have publicly named andrelease
description_zh: 荷兰警方已公开点名并释放了

title: Utrecht Univ. files charges against activists for lengthy building occupation
title_zh: 乌得勒支大学对长期占领校舍的激进分子提起诉讼。
description: Utrecht University (UU) has filed charges following vandalism and occupation of several campus buildings, including sites in the city and at the Utrecht Science Park, the university said Thursday.
description_zh: 乌特勒支大学 (UU) 周四表示，该校已就多处校园建筑遭到破坏和占领提起诉讼，这些建筑包括位于市区和乌特勒支科学园的校址。

title: NXT museum in Amsterdam-Noord files for bankruptcy, plans restart
title_zh: 位于阿姆斯特丹北部的NXT博物馆申请破产，计划重启
description: The NXT Museum on Asterweg in Amsterdam-Noord has filed for bankruptcy for its commercial entity, Digital Art Museum B.V., citing lingering financial pressures from the Covid-19 pandemic.
description_zh: 位于阿姆斯特丹北部 Asterweg 的 NXT 博物馆已为其商业实体 Digital Art Museum BV 申请破产，理由是 Covid-19 疫情带来的持续财务压力。

title: 2025 ranks as sixth warmest year on record in the Netherlands
title_zh: 2025年是荷兰有记录以来第六个最暖的年份。
description: The year 2025 is set to be the sixth warmest on record in the Netherlands, with an average temperature of 11.5 degrees Celsius measured in De Bilt, the site of the country’s official weather statio
description_zh: 2025年预计将成为荷兰有记录以来第六个最温暖的年份，在荷兰官方气象站所在地德比尔特测得的平均气温为11.5摄氏度。

title: 307 Dutch firms bankrupt in November, 46 fewer than last year but 36% more than October
title_zh: 11月份共有307家荷兰公司破产，比去年同期减少46家，但比10月份增加36%。
description: In November 2025, 307 Dutch companies were declared bankrupt, marking a decrease of 46 firms compared to the same month last year, the
description_zh: 2025年11月，荷兰共有307家公司宣布破产，比去年同期减少了46家。

title: Amsterdam man receives 10-year sentence for armed robberies targeting Grindr users
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹男子因持械抢劫 Grindr 用户被判处 10 年监禁
description: A 23-year-old Amsterdam resident, Lucas M.
description_zh: 一位23岁的阿姆斯特丹居民卢卡斯·M。

title: Inmate dies by suicide at Spijkenisse police station
title_zh: 斯派克尼瑟警察局一名囚犯自杀身亡
description: An inmate at the Spijkenisse police station died by suicide, authorities confirmed.
description_zh: 当局证实，斯派克尼瑟警察局一名囚犯自杀身亡。

title: Researchers spot hundreds of rooftop spaces for housing in Amsterdam’s historic center
title_zh: 研究人员在阿姆斯特丹历史中心发现了数百个可用于居住的屋顶空间。
description: Researchers have mapped numerous unused rooftop and building spaces in Amsterdam’s historic center, highlighting opportunities to create additional housing in a city struggling with a "chronic shor
description_zh: 研究人员绘制了阿姆斯特丹历史中心大量未利用的屋顶和建筑空间地图，突显了在长期面临住房短缺问题的城市中创造更多住房的机会。

title: Fog and overcast conditions to dominate weekend weather in the Netherlands
title_zh: 荷兰周末天气将以雾和阴天为主。
description: Saturday morning begins mostly cloudy across the Netherlands, with gray skies widespread and fog or low cloud cover reducing visibility in several areas,
description_zh: 周六早晨，荷兰大部分地区多云，天空灰蒙蒙的，一些地区有雾或低云，能见度降低。

title: Counterfeit oxycodone pills kill at least 13 in Netherlands
title_zh: 荷兰至少13人因服用假冒羟考酮药片死亡
description: Counterfeit prescription pills sold online have killed at least 13 people in the Netherlands and caused dozens of serious poisonings, according to an Erasmus MC investigation conducted at the reque
description_zh: 根据伊拉斯谟医学中心（Erasmus MC）应要求进行的一项调查，网上销售的假冒处方药已在荷兰造成至少13人死亡，并导致数十人严重中毒。

title: Limburg wants a nearby stop on the future London–Germany high-speed rail line
title_zh: 林堡省希望在未来的伦敦-德国高速铁路上设立一个附近的站点。
description: The southeastern Dutch province of Limburg has high hopes for being more closely connected to the planned high-speed rail link between Germany and London.
description_zh: 荷兰东南部的林堡省对与计划中的德国至伦敦高速铁路连接线建立更紧密的联系寄予厚望。

title: Man found dead on road in Maren-Kessel; 23-year-old arrested in suspected hit-and-run
title_zh: 一名男子被发现死于马伦-凯塞尔的一条道路上；一名23岁男子因涉嫌肇事逃逸被捕。
description: A passerby discovered a dead man on a rural road in Maren-Kessel Friday night, and police arrested a 23-year-old local man about 20 minutes later in connection with what investigators believe was a
description_zh: 周五晚间，一名路人在马伦-凯塞尔一条乡村公路上发现一具男性尸体。大约20分钟后，警方逮捕了一名23岁的当地男子，调查人员认为该男子与这起案件有关。

title: Queer children less safe in Dutch society, Children’s Ombudsman warns
title_zh: 荷兰儿童权益监察专员警告：同性恋儿童在荷兰社会更不安全
description: LGBTQIA+ children face growing challenges in their daily lives, with bullying, threats, and attacks becoming more common.
description_zh: LGBTQIA+ 儿童在日常生活中面临着日益严峻的挑战，欺凌、威胁和攻击变得越来越普遍。

title: Amsterdam joins cities using special officers to fight sexual harassment in public
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹加入其他城市的行列，启用专职警员打击公共场所的性骚扰行为。
description: Amsterdam will take part in a pilot that lets special enforcement officers (BOAs) tackle sexual harassment on the streets. The program is already active in Rotterdam, Utrecht, and Almere.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹将参与一项试点项目，该项目允许特警（BOA）在街头打击性骚扰。该项目已在鹿特丹、乌得勒支和阿尔梅勒开展。

title: Researchers say disruptions in protests are not due to existing regulations
title_zh: 研究人员表示，抗议活动中的混乱并非由现有法规造成。
description: Most protests in the Netherlands take place peacefully, so tightening regulations is unnecessary, the Scientific Research and Documentation Centre (WODC) finds.
description_zh: 科学研究与文献中心 (WODC) 发现，荷兰的大多数抗议活动都是和平进行的，因此没有必要加强监管。

title: Two-thirds of maternity nurses feel families need more care than they can provide
title_zh: 三分之二的产科护士认为，家庭需要的护理超过了他们所能提供的。
description: Due to shortages in maternity care, nearly two-thirds of maternity nurses feel that they are unable to provide sufficient care to the families in their care,
description_zh: 由于产科护理人员短缺，近三分之二的产科护士认为她们无法为所照顾的家庭提供足够的护理。

title: Three convicted in road rage shooting that killed Eindhoven man in 2024
title_zh: 2024年，三名男子因路怒枪击案被定罪，该案导致埃因霍温一名男子死亡。
description: Three men were found guilty on Friday in the murder of an Eindhoven man who wasshot i
description_zh: 周五，三名男子被判谋杀罪名成立，他们杀害了一名埃因霍温男子，该男子遭枪击身亡。

title: Dutch Intelligence Service launches 2025 holiday puzzle challenge
title_zh: 荷兰情报局推出2025年假日拼图挑战
description: The Dutch General Intelligence and Security Service (AIVD) has released its 2025 holiday puzzle, inviting both adults and youths to test their problem-solving skills.
description_zh: 荷兰总情报安全局 (AIVD) 发布了 2025 年假日拼图游戏，邀请成人和青少年测试他们的解决问题能力。

title: DNA confirms wolf shot dead by hunters was “problem wolf” Bram
title_zh: DNA检测证实，被猎人射杀的狼是“问题狼”布拉姆
description: The wolf was shot dead earlier this month in woodland near Utrecht has been identified as problem wolf GW3237m, also...
description_zh: 本月初在乌得勒支附近林地被射杀的那只狼已被确认为问题狼GW3237m，此外……

title: Prosecutor moves to drop charges in 2003 Rotterdam fatal stabbing case
title_zh: 检察官拟撤销2003年鹿特丹致命刺杀案的指控
description: A Libyan man who was suspected of fatally stabbing 33-year-old Lassaad Chourou in a Rotterdam home more than two decades ago likely acted in self-defense, the Public Prosecution Service (OM) said o
description_zh: 荷兰公共检察署（OM）表示，一名利比亚男子涉嫌在二十多年前于鹿特丹一处住宅内刺死33岁的拉萨德·舒鲁，他很可能是出于自卫。

title: Schiedam Man arrested on suspicion of multiple sexual assaults, rape at massage parlor
title_zh: 斯希丹男子因涉嫌在按摩院多次性侵和强奸被捕
description: A 47-year-old man from Schiedam was arrested on Saturday on suspicion of rape and sexual assault.
description_zh: 周六，一名来自斯希丹的 47 岁男子因涉嫌强奸和性侵犯被捕。

title: Coalition with D66, CDA, VVD and JA21 is “most realistic option”
title_zh: 与D66、CDA、VVD和JA21组成联盟是“最现实的选择”。
description: A new coalition government made up of D66, the CDA, the VVD and far-right JA21 is currently the “most realistic...
description_zh: 由D66、CDA、VVD和极右翼JA21组成的新联合政府目前是“最现实的……”

title: Providers earning up to €380 mil. per year from unspent gift cards
title_zh: 供应商每年从未使用的礼品卡中获利高达 3.8 亿欧元
description: Netherlands residents are fanatical about gift cards, but often leave them unspent.
description_zh: 荷兰居民对礼品卡非常热衷，但经常会把它们闲置不用。

title: Netherlands must brace for far more extreme weather, says Dutch meteorological institute
title_zh: 荷兰气象研究所表示，荷兰必须做好应对更加极端天气的准备。
description: The KNMI warns in a new report that the Netherlands must be prepared for far more severe weather extremes than it has seen before.
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）在一份新报告中警告说，荷兰必须做好准备，应对比以往任何时候都更加严重的极端天气。

title: From heatwaves to heavy frost: NL must ready for extreme weather
title_zh: 从热浪到严寒：荷兰必须做好应对极端天气的准备
description: The KNMI weather bureau has published a new report outlining the potential impact of a range of severe weather scenarios...
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）发布了一份新报告，概述了一系列极端天气情景可能造成的影响……

title: €3 EU import fee for non-EU parcels approved, Netherlands may add extra charge
title_zh: 非欧盟包裹进口需缴纳 3 欧元欧盟进口税，荷兰可能另加费用。
description: Buying parcels from outside the EU will get more expensive. Starting in July, consumers must pay a 3-euro import fee on all packages, including those from Chinese online stores.
description_zh: 从欧盟以外地区购买包裹将变得更加昂贵。从7月起，消费者必须为所有包裹支付3欧元的进口税，包括从中国网店购买的包裹。

title: CDA leader Henri Bontenbal says D66, CDA, VVD, and JA21 likely to form government
title_zh: 基督教民主联盟（CDA）领导人亨利·邦滕巴尔表示，民主66党、基督教民主联盟、自由民主党和JA21党可能组建政府。
description: Henri Bontenbal, leader of the CDA, has stated that a coalition including D66, CDA, VVD, and JA21 is currently the most realistic option.
description_zh: CDA领导人亨利·邦滕巴尔表示，目前最现实的选择是组建由D66、CDA、VVD和JA21组成的联盟。

title: Aggressive wolf in Utrechtse Heuvelrug killed, identity confirmed by DNA
title_zh: 乌得勒支Heuvelrug一头好斗的狼被杀，DNA确认其身份
description: The wolf that was shot dead in the Utrechtse Heuvelrug was the aggressive wolf named GW3237m, this was confirmed by fast DNA testing, according to Utrecht’s nature and agriculture commissioner, Mir
description_zh: 据乌特勒支自然与农业专员米尔称，快速DNA检测证实，在乌特勒支丘陵地带被射杀的狼正是编号为GW3237m的那只具有攻击性的狼。

title: Hard cheese: best Gouda in the world is made in Belgium
title_zh: 硬质奶酪：世界上最好的高达奶酪产自比利时
description: The best Gouda cheese is not made in Gouda but in Belgium, according to the jury at the Concours International...
description_zh: 根据国际奶酪大赛的评委们的说法，最好的豪达奶酪并非产自豪达，而是产自比利时……

title: The Dutch must invest €150 billion for their long-term future
title_zh: 荷兰人必须为长远未来投资1500亿欧元。
description: The Netherlands must focus on the long term and improve its investment climate or risk falling behind amid geopolitical tensions,...
description_zh: 荷兰必须着眼长远，改善投资环境，否则将面临在地缘政治紧张局势中落后的风险……

title: Former ASML CEO warns the Netherlands faces tough choices to secure future prosperity
title_zh: ASML前首席执行官警告称，荷兰在确保未来繁荣方面面临艰难抉择。
description: Former ASML chief executive Peter Wennink argues in a government-commissioned report that the Netherlands faces tough decisions if it wants to foster investment and maintain its standard of living.
description_zh: 前 ASML 首席执行官彼得·温尼克在一份政府委托撰写的报告中指出，如果荷兰想要促进投资并维持其生活水平，就必须做出艰难的决定。

title: Geminids meteor shower lights up the sky this Saturday evening
title_zh: 本周六晚，双子座流星雨将点亮夜空。
description: The Geminids meteor shower is expected to peak during the evening hours of Saturday, leading into Sunday.
description_zh: 双子座流星雨预计将在周六晚间至周日达到高峰。

title: Dutch firm Mollie buys UK direct debit specialist GoCardless for €1.1 billion
title_zh: 荷兰公司Mollie以11亿欧元收购英国直接借记卡专家GoCardless
description: Mollie, the Dutch payments company, is buying the UK-based GoCardless for 1.1 billion euros.
description_zh: 荷兰支付公司 Mollie 将以 11 亿欧元收购英国支付公司 GoCardless。

title: Podcast: The Enough Car-Crash Politics For One Year Edition
title_zh: 播客：一年内够了的糟糕政治篇
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想支持 DutchNews 播客，并让我们的焦糖华夫饼和橙味甜甜圈库存充足吗？点击此处成为……

title: Militant farmers send bailiffs to Brabant politicians over plans
title_zh: 激进农民因计划向布拉班特省政客派遣法警
description: Militant farmers’ group Farmers Defence Force (FDF) has sent bailiffs to the homes of a large number of politicians in...
description_zh: 激进的农民组织“农民自卫队”（FDF）已派出法警前往众多政客的住所……

title: Passengers stranded in Caribbean after rat spotted on KLM plane
title_zh: 荷航飞机发现老鼠，乘客滞留加勒比海
description: More than 250 passengers have been stranded on Aruba and Bonaire after their KLM flight to Amsterdam was cancelled because...
description_zh: 由于荷航飞往阿姆斯特丹的航班被取消，超过250名乘客滞留在阿鲁巴和博内尔岛……

title: More councils to use smaller ballot in local elections trial
title_zh: 更多地方议会将在地方选举试点中使用小尺寸选票。
description: Voters in at least 11 local authority areas will be faced with a smaller ballot paper in next year’s local...
description_zh: 明年地方选举中，至少有11个地方政府辖区的选民将面临尺寸更小的选票……

title: Black soldiers' panels removed from cemetery in Dutch town to avoid Trump gov't "ire"
title_zh: 为避免触怒特朗普政府，荷兰小镇墓地中黑人士兵的纪念碑被移除。
description: Thepanels highlighting Black soldiers’ contributions to the fight against
description_zh: 这些展板重点介绍了黑人士兵在反抗战争中所作出的贡献。

title: NL must be reclassified as “small” to cull wolves: minister
title_zh: 部长：必须将荷兰重新划分为“小型”国家才能进行狼群捕杀
description: Caretaker junior nature minister Jean Rummenie (BBB) thinks he has found a loophole allowing him to cull the number of...
description_zh: 代理自然事务初级部长让·鲁梅尼（BBB党）认为他找到了一个漏洞，可以让他减少……的数量。

title: Mollie buys British GoCardless in record Dutch fintech deal
title_zh: Mollie 以创纪录的荷兰金融科技交易收购英国 GoCardless
description: Dutch payment company Mollie is acquiring its British rival GoCardless in a deal valued at €1.1 billion, the largest takeover...
description_zh: 荷兰支付公司Mollie将以11亿欧元的价格收购其英国竞争对手GoCardless，这是迄今为止规模最大的收购案……

title: Dutch clubs struggle in Europe as Feyenoord falter and AZ win
title_zh: 荷甲俱乐部在欧洲赛场表现挣扎，费耶诺德失利，阿尔克马尔获胜
description: There was disappointment for all three Dutch clubs taking part in the Europa League competition on Thursday night, with no...
description_zh: 周四晚，参加欧联杯的三支荷兰俱乐部均遭遇失望，无缘晋级……

title: Trump threatens new sanctions against ICC in The Hague
title_zh: 特朗普威胁要对位于海牙的国际刑事法院实施新的制裁
description: US president Donald Trump is once again reportedly targeting the International Criminal Court (ICC) in The Hague, threatening a new...
description_zh: 据报道，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普再次将矛头指向位于海牙的国际刑事法院（ICC），威胁要采取新的行动……

title: Eleven municipalities to test smaller ballot in municipal elections next year
title_zh: 明年将有11个市镇在市政选举中试行小尺寸选票。
description: At least 11 municipalities will use a smaller ballot paper in the municipal elections in March next year.
description_zh: 明年三月举行的市政选举中，至少有 11 个市镇将使用较小的选票。

title: Over 250 travelers stranded on Aruba, Bonaire over rat on KLM flight
title_zh: 超过250名旅客因荷航航班上的鼠患滞留在阿鲁巴和博内尔岛。
description: A rat on board a KLM plane left over 250 travelers stranded in Aruba and Bonaire.
description_zh: 荷兰皇家航空一架飞机上发现老鼠，导致250多名旅客滞留在阿鲁巴和博内尔岛。

title: Gang targeting crypto millionaires behind Dutch man's murder in Spain: report
title_zh: 据报道，一个专门针对加密货币富豪的犯罪团伙在西班牙谋杀了一名荷兰男子。
description: A gang specialized in robbing rich cryptocurrency traders was behind the murder of a 37-year-old Dutch crypto millionaire in Spain earlier this year, the Spanish newspaper El País reporte
description_zh: 西班牙《国家报》报道，今年早些时候，一名37岁的荷兰加密货币百万富翁在西班牙被谋杀，而幕后黑手是一个专门抢劫富有的加密货币交易者的团伙。

title: At least one Dutch account among dozens of LGBTQIA+ pages quietly deleted by Meta
title_zh: Meta 悄悄删除了数十个 LGBTQIA+ 页面，其中至少有一个是荷兰账户。
description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp, has quietly removed or blocked around 50 accounts that revolve around LGBTQIA+ or abortion-related topics,
description_zh: Facebook、Instagram 和 WhatsApp 的母公司 Meta 已悄悄删除或屏蔽了约 50 个与 LGBTQIA+ 或堕胎相关话题有关的帐户。

title: Retail Pension Fund sues former BCC directors for €7.5 Million in unpaid premiums
title_zh: 零售养老基金起诉英国商会前董事，追讨750万欧元未缴保费
description: The Retail Pension Fund is suing the former directors of the bankrupt electronics retailer BCC, accusing the company of underpaying pension contributions.
description_zh: 零售养老基金起诉破产电子产品零售商 BCC 的前董事，指控该公司少缴养老金。

title: Homes in the Netherlands selling faster in 2025 despite price increases, higher volume
title_zh: 尽管价格上涨且成交量增加，但预计到2025年，荷兰房屋销售速度将加快。
description: Houses sold faster in 2025 than a year earlier, reports property website Funda. The number of homes listed on Funda also grew this year.
description_zh: 据房地产网站Funda报道，2025年房屋销售速度比上一年更快。Funda网站上的房屋挂牌数量今年也有所增长。

title: Feyenoord collapse in Romania, lose 4-3 to FCSB after last-second goal
title_zh: 费耶诺德在罗马尼亚崩盘，最后时刻被FCSB绝杀，以3-4落败。
description: Feyenoord’s European campaign hit a new low on Thursday. The Rotterdammers threw away a two-goal lead, losing 4-3 away to FCSB in the last second of the game.
description_zh: 费耶诺德的欧战征程在周四遭遇新低谷。这支鹿特丹球队挥霍了两球领先的优势，在比赛的最后一秒以3-4负于FCSB。

title: Go Ahead Eagles fall just short in 2-1 defeat to Lyon in the UEFA Europa League
title_zh: 前进之鹰队在欧足联欧洲联赛中以 1-2 惜败于里昂队，无缘冠军。
description: Go Ahead Eagles lost narrowly to French side Olympique Lyonnais in the UEFA Europa League.
description_zh: 在欧足联欧洲联赛中，前进之鹰队惜败于法国球队里昂队。

title: Utrecht’s Europa League hopes fade after last-gasp defeat to Nottingham Forest
title_zh: 乌得勒支在最后时刻被诺丁汉森林绝杀，欧联杯资格希望破灭。
description: FC Utrecht picked up another defeat in the UEFA Europa League on Thursday after English side Nottingham Forest scored a 89th-minute winner in the Galgenwaard.
description_zh: 周四，FC Utrecht 在欧足联欧洲联赛中再次遭遇失利，英格兰球队诺丁汉森林在 Galgenwaard 球场凭借第 89 分钟的进球绝杀对手。

title: Two girls convicted of eight arsons in Alkmaar, must pay 130,000 euros
title_zh: 两名少女因在阿尔克马尔纵火八起被判有罪，须支付13万欧元罚款。
description: The Alkmaar court on Wednesday found two girls guilty of eight arsons committed in Alkmaar on August 16 last year.
description_zh: 阿尔克马尔法院周三裁定两名女孩犯有去年 8 月 16 日在阿尔克马尔发生的八起纵火案。

title: Amsterdam launches TikTok channel to provide reliable info for youth
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹推出TikTok账号，为年轻人提供可靠信息。
description: Amsterdam has launched a TikTok account,@JongAmsterdam, aimed at providing young people with trustworthy information on topics ranging f
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹开通了TikTok账号@JongAmsterdam，旨在为年轻人提供涵盖广泛主题的可靠信息。

title: AZ Alkmaar cruise to 3-0 win over FC Drita in UEFA Conference League
title_zh: 阿尔克马尔在欧足联联盟联赛中以3-0轻松战胜德里塔。
description: AZ Alkmaar had a comfortable evening in Kosovo on Thursday evening, beating FC Drita 3-0 in the UEFA Conference League.
description_zh: 周四晚上，阿尔克马尔在科索沃轻松取胜，在欧足联联盟联赛中以 3-0 击败了德里塔足球俱乐部。

title: Amsterdam is Netherlands’ top shopping destination; Eindhoven also popular
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹是荷兰最热门的购物目的地；埃因霍温也很受欢迎。
description: Amsterdam continues to dominate as the country’s most popular shopping destination, with the P.C.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹继续保持着该国最受欢迎的购物目的地地位，PC

title: Survivor of deadly Oss Stint crash testifies as operators admit false safety claims
title_zh: 奥斯斯廷特致命事故幸存者作证，运营商承认虚假安全声明
description: Thedeadly Stint crashin Oss on September 20, 2018, which resulted in the death of
description_zh: 2018年9月20日，致命的Stint飞机在奥斯坠毁，导致一人死亡。

title: “That panel should go”: how Margraten erased Black Liberators
title_zh: “那个小组应该解散”：马格拉滕是如何抹杀黑人解放者的
description: A panel at the American war cemetery in Margraten commemorating US soldiers’ fight against racism during World War II was...
description_zh: 在马格拉滕的美国战争公墓里，有一块纪念碑，缅怀二战期间美国士兵与种族主义作斗争的事迹……

title: Dutch ministry expands area under urgent travel warning for Thailand, Cambodia
title_zh: 荷兰外交部扩大了对泰国和柬埔寨的紧急旅行警告范围。
description: The Netherlands has extended the area along the border between Thailand and Cambodia which is
description_zh: 荷兰已扩大了泰国和柬埔寨边境沿线的区域，该区域是

title: Video: Dutch men run naked through German city, spark uproar and police investigation
title_zh: 视频：荷兰男子裸奔德国城市，引发骚乱和警方调查
description: Nine men, believed to be Dutch, ran naked through the center of Kleve, Germany, on Monday afternoon, causing public outrage and prompting police reports of public indecency, according to German new
description_zh: 据德国新闻报道，周一下午，九名据信为荷兰籍的男子在德国克莱沃市中心裸奔，引发公众强烈愤慨，警方也已接到有关其行为构成公共猥亵的报案。

title: Amsterdam’s city centre streets still number one for shoppers
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市中心的街道仍然是购物者的首选之地
description: Amsterdam remains in pole position as the most popular city for retail shopping, a survey by real estate advisor CBRE...
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹依然稳居零售购物最受欢迎城市榜首，房地产咨询公司世邦魏理仕（CBRE）的一项调查显示……

title: Three guilty of coercing, pimping girls out to over 300 men in sex trafficking case
title_zh: 三人因胁迫、强迫少女卖淫给300多名男子而被判犯有性交易罪
description: Three suspects have beensentenced for traffickingthree girls, two of whom were minors, and eight
description_zh: 三名嫌疑人因贩卖三名女孩（其中两名是未成年人）和八名儿童而被判刑。

title: Counterterrorism office hit by wave of returned emergency booklets amid conspiracy fears
title_zh: 反恐办公室因阴谋论担忧而收到大量退回的紧急手册
description: The National Coordinator for Counterterrorism and Security (NCTV), the Dutch government agency responsible for counterterrorism and national security, has received a large number of returned emerge
description_zh: 荷兰负责反恐和国家安全的政府机构——国家反恐与安全协调员办公室（NCTV）已收到大量返回的紧急求助信息。

title: Trial set for PVV politician who struck Extinction Rebellion demonstrator with his car
title_zh: 一名PVV政客驾车撞向“反抗灭绝”示威者，即将受审。
description: The Public Prosecution Service is taking legal action against the Noord-Holland council and PVV member Ronald van Tiggelen for striking a 67-year-old Extinction Rebellion protester on March 3
description_zh: 荷兰公共检察署对北荷兰省议会和自由党成员罗纳德·范·蒂格伦提起诉讼，指控其于3月3日殴打一名67岁的“反抗灭绝”抗议者。

title: No need to change Dutch demonstration law, researchers say
title_zh: 研究人员称，荷兰无需修改示威游行法。
description: Researchers say there is no need to change the law on the right to protest in the Netherlands, despite political...
description_zh: 研究人员表示，尽管存在政治因素，但荷兰没有必要修改有关抗议权的法律……

title: Teaching assistant confesses to sexually abusing 20 kids at Helmond school
title_zh: 一名助教承认在赫尔蒙德学校性侵了20名学生
description: Former teacher assistant Wesley W.
description_zh: 前任教师助理韦斯利·W.

title: Key players in Amsterdam murder of crime reporter convicted on appeal; Up to 27.5 years
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹谋杀案主犯上诉后被判有罪；最高刑期27.5年。
description: The Amsterdam Court of Appeals issued verdicts against nine suspects accused of killing or assisting in the murder of crime reporter Peter R.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹上诉法院对九名被控杀害或协助杀害犯罪记者彼得·R的嫌疑人作出判决。

title: Rail authority warns of mounting maintenance backlog amid staff, budget shortages
title_zh: 铁路部门警告称，由于人员和预算短缺，维修积压问题日益严重。
description: ProRail will only be able to carry out strictly necessary maintenance on more and more sections of the rail network in the coming years.
description_zh: 未来几年，ProRail 将只能对越来越多的铁路网路段进行严格必要的维护。

title: Rijksmuseum branch to open in Eindhoven, featuring works by Rembrandt, Vermeer, and more
title_zh: 荷兰国家博物馆分馆将在埃因霍温开幕，展出伦勃朗、维米尔等人的作品。
description: The municipality of Eindhoven and the Rijksmuseum
description_zh: 埃因霍温市政府和国立博物馆

title: Rijksmuseum to open its first satellite branch in Eindhoven
title_zh: 荷兰国家博物馆将在埃因霍温开设其首个卫星分馆
description: Amsterdam’s Rijksmuseum and Eindhoven council have announced plans for a new branch of the world-famous museum in the city, giving...
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹国立博物馆和埃因霍温市政府宣布计划在该市开设一家世界著名博物馆的新分馆……

title: Netherlands seizes over 90 illegal taxidermy animals in global wildlife crime operation
title_zh: 荷兰在全球野生动物犯罪行动中查获90多件非法动物标本。
description: Dutch authorities seized more than 90 protected, illegally traded taxidermy animals in Brabant and confiscated additional wildlife products across the country during a large international enforceme
description_zh: 荷兰当局在布拉班特省查获了90多件受保护的非法交易的动物标本，并在全国范围内开展的大规模国际执法行动中没收了其他野生动物制品。

title: Nearly half of the prisoners in overcrowded Dutch prisons are in pre-trial detention
title_zh: 荷兰监狱人满为患，近一半的囚犯处于审前羁押状态。
description: Due to staff shortages and a shortage of cells, Dutch prisons have been overcrowded for some time.
description_zh: 由于人员短缺和牢房短缺，荷兰监狱已经人满为患一段时间了。

title: Raid turns up dozens of stuffed protected animals in Brabant
title_zh: 突击搜查在布拉班特省发现数十件受保护动物标本
description: A joint operation by Interpol and Dutch government organisations to combat the illegal trade in protected animals and plants has...
description_zh: 国际刑警组织和荷兰政府机构联合开展了一项打击受保护动植物非法贸易的行动……

title: Fifteen Dutch players in PDC world darts championships
title_zh: 十五名荷兰选手参加PDC世界飞镖锦标赛
description: The PDC world darts championship returns to Alexandra Palace in London this week for what organisers say will be the...
description_zh: PDC世界飞镖锦标赛本周重返伦敦亚历山德拉宫，组织者称这将是……

title: “Hope and greed” are driving soaring online investment fraud
title_zh: “希望与贪婪”正在推动网络投资诈骗案激增。
description: The amount lost through online investment fraud may be as high as €750 million, 10 times the amount reported to...
description_zh: 网络投资诈骗造成的损失可能高达7.5亿欧元，是已报告金额的10倍……
